maintenance.title: We’ll be back soon
maintenance.message: Sorry for the inconvenience. We’re doing some maintenance right now, and everything will be available again shortly. Thank you for your patience.

home.title: Home Page Management
home.noReviewImages: No review images uploaded yet. Click "Upload Review Image" to add images.
home.educationImagesHint: This section is shown as a carousel. Recommended ratio: 4:3 or 3:2 landscape, at least 1200 px wide. Keep all photos close to the same ratio for smooth scrolling.
home.blogDescription: Select up to 3 articles to display in the Blog section on the landing page.
home.footerLegalDescription: Optional text shown at the bottom of the landing page (e.g. public billing details, legal entity).
home.footerLegalPlaceholder: e.g. Sole proprietor Ivanov I.I., INN …
home.footerLinksDescription: Named links shown below the legal text on the landing page (e.g. Privacy policy, Terms). Saved with Save Changes.
home.noFooterLinks: No agreement links yet. Add a display name and URL above.
home.footerLinksBothRequired: Please enter both display name and URL.
home.contactLinksDescription: Manage your social media and contact links that appear in the footer of the landing page. You can add multiple links for the same platform (e.g., personal Telegram and channel).
home.noContactLinks: No contact links added yet. Use the form above to add your first contact link.
home.invalidArticleIds: Invalid article ID(s) found: {{ids}}. These articles are not available and will be cleared.
home.invalidMoreAboutMeArticleId: The "More about me" article ({{id}}) is no longer available. The selection was cleared.
home.noImagesFound: No images found in the gallery. Upload images to see them here.
home.heroPhotosSubtitle: Manage landing page hero images. Left & Right frames: portrait 1:1–3:4, min 1200×1600 px. Mobile: portrait 9:16, min 900×1600 px.
home.rightFrameSubtitle: Shown on the right side of the hero (desktop).
home.leftFrameSubtitle: Shown on the left side of the hero (desktop), behind the Book a Session button.
home.frameBackgroundColoursSubtitle: Shown when no photo is uploaded, and fills the sides beyond 1920 px on wide screens.
home.maintenanceModeSubtitle: Turn off to show the maintenance page to visitors.

bookingSettings.title: Booking Settings
bookingSettings.bookingSlotsIntervalHelper: Interval between available booking slots (e.g., 30 = slots every 30 minutes)
bookingSettings.bookingFirstSlotIntervalHelper: Minimum time from now until the first bookable slot (minimum: 10 minutes)
bookingSettings.bookingCancellationIntervalHelper: Minimum time before booking start time when cancellation is allowed
bookingSettings.bookingUpdatingIntervalHelper: Minimum time before booking start time when updates are allowed
bookingSettings.maxPendingBookingsHelper: Maximum number of pending booking requests a user can have at one time
bookingSettings.defaultTimezoneHelper: Default timezone for availability rules (IANA timezone identifier). UTC offset is calculated automatically.
bookingSettings.roundBookingSuggestionsHelper: When enabled, booking time suggestions will be rounded to the nearest 00,15,30,45 minutes
bookingSettings.timezoneChangedWarning: Changing timezone requires all active availability rules to be archived first.

bookingSettings.mustBeGreaterThanOrEqual: Must be greater than or equal to 0
bookingSettings.mustBeGreaterThanOrEqual1: Must be greater than or equal to 1
bookingSettings.mustBeGreaterThanOrEqual10: Must be greater than or equal to 10 minutes
